title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMLanduse
description: An area of land use from OpenStreetMap tagged with landuse=*. Describes the primary human purpose or use of an area of land

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMLanduse

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification

landuseType.description: Property. The OSM landuse tag classifying the primary human use of the land. Enum:'commercial, construction, education, industrial, residential, retail, farmland, forest, meadow, orchard, ...'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:landuse'

crop.description: Property. The crop grown on the land if landuse=farmland. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:crop'

trees.description: Property. The type of trees grown if landuse=forest or orchard. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:trees'

operator.description: Property. Name of the entity operating or managing the area

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources
